connectors.name: Mogul
connectors.tagline: Catalog, master recordings & royalty source of truth
connectors.description: The live royalty connector. Lode reads your full catalog, master ownership, and royalty statements over MCP, then flags neighboring-rights gaps and missing payouts.

capabilities_schema.label: Read catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Let Lode read your full catalog and master ownership.

capabilities_schema.label: Read royalty statements
capabilities_schema.description: Pull statements across connected sources to reconcile earnings.

capabilities_schema.label: Flag missing money
capabilities_schema.description: Surface unregistered rights and uncollected payouts.

capabilities_schema.label: Draft registrations
capabilities_schema.description: Prepare ASCAP/BMI/SoundExchange registrations for missing rights.

agent_action.label: Audit my catalog for missing money
agent_action.prompt: Audit my Mogul catalog for missing money and unregistered neighboring rights.

connectors.name: Suno
connectors.description: Bring finished songs and stems straight into your catalog. Lode keeps new Suno releases in sync with Mogul so every track is tracked, owned, and monetized from day one.

capabilities_schema.label: Import releases
capabilities_schema.description: Pull finished Suno songs into your catalog.

capabilities_schema.label: Export stems & masters
capabilities_schema.description: Retrieve stems and masters for downstream use.

capabilities_schema.label: Sync to catalog
capabilities_schema.description: Register imported releases in Mogul automatically.

agent_action.label: Sync & register my latest releases
agent_action.prompt: Sync my latest Suno releases into the catalog and register them.

connectors.name: Disco
connectors.tagline: Pitch your catalog into live sync briefs — film, TV, ads & brands
connectors.description: The demand side. Lode reads active sync briefs, matches your catalog by mood, tempo and genre, drafts and tracks pitches, and pipes expected placement fees back into your Mogul forecast — turning missing money into new money.

capabilities_schema.label: Read active briefs
capabilities_schema.description: Pull live sync briefs from film, TV, ad and brand buyers.

capabilities_schema.label: Match catalog to briefs
capabilities_schema.description: Match your tracks to briefs by mood, tempo and genre.

capabilities_schema.label: Draft pitches
capabilities_schema.description: Write a pitch for the best-matched brief on your behalf.

capabilities_schema.label: Auto-submit pitches
capabilities_schema.description: Submit pitches to buyers without a human approval step.

agent_action.label: Pitch my catalog into this week's briefs
agent_action.prompt: Pitch my catalog into this week's active sync briefs and forecast the placement royalties.

connectors.name: Spotify for Artists
connectors.description: Stream counts, playlist adds, and listener geography — context Lode uses to prioritize which tracks to pitch and register first.

connectors.name: DistroKid
connectors.description: Deliver releases to every store and surface release metadata so Lode can reconcile what's live against what's earning.

connectors.name: ASCAP
connectors.description: Register works and collect performance royalties. Lode drafts and submits registrations on your behalf.

connectors.name: SoundExchange
connectors.description: Collect digital performance royalties for master owners — the home of the neighboring-rights money Lode surfaces in Today.

connectors.name: Songtradr
connectors.description: List your catalog on the largest B2B music licensing marketplace as a second sync channel alongside Disco.
